descFull: Natively — Free open-source AI meeting assistant, interview copilot, and note taker. The best alternative to Cluely, Otter, Granola, Final Round AI, Fireflies, and Interview Coder. Real-time transcription, AI meeting notes, lecture recording, local RAG, BYOK, and stealth mode. Runs locally. No subscriptions. No data breaches.
